HR.a: Employees can apply for leave through the HR portal. Annual leave is 20 days.
Standard working hours are 9 AM to 6 PM, Monday to Friday.

HR.q: How to request a salary advance?
HR.a: Submit a request form to HR with justification.

Admin.q: How to book a meeting room?
Admin.a: Use the admin portal to check availability and book.
Fill out the supplies request form in the admin system.

IT.a: Use your company email credentials on Outlook or webmail.
Contact IT support or use the self-service portal.
Raise a ticket with IT department for approval.

Mines.a: Follow all PPE guidelines and report incidents immediately.
Shifts are 8 hours, rotating every week.

CHP.a: Follow standard operating procedures for equipment maintenance.
Dial 911 for emergencies, or contact CHP supervisor.
